# Form 1023 officers, directors, and key employees attachment

Use this as the working attachment for IRS filing and internal approvals.

## Officers and directors table

| Name | Title | Mailing address | Average hours/week | Compensation | Related to another insider? |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| `Nikita Tkachenko` | President / Director | `320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118` | `[HOURS]` | `0` | `No` |
| `Jake Cosgrove` | Secretary / Treasurer / Director | `320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118` | `[HOURS]` | `0` | `No` |
| `Parsa Rahimi` | Director | `320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118` | `[HOURS]` | `0` | `No` |

## Notes to complete before filing

- Include every director and officer.
- Add key employees if any exist.
- No family relationships are currently expected among insiders based on the current intake sheet.
- If anyone is compensated, cross-reference the compensation review policy and board approval minutes.
